message:
fix: clear setTimeout in Promise.race patterns to prevent memory leaks

Fixed setTimeout cleanup bugs across 8 files where timeouts were not
cleared when Promise.race resolved via the main promise. This prevents:
- Memory leaks from timer references
- Potential unhandled promise rejections when timeout fires after success
- Attempts to kill already-exited processes

Files fixed:
- jfp.service.ts, ms.service.ts, pt.service.ts, slb.service.ts, apr.service.ts
- mcp-agentmail.ts (callTool timeout)
- health.ts (checkCLI timeout)
- caam/runner.ts (LocalExecutor and DockerExecutor)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
